assertions.expectation: Configures a recurring maintenance window for weekends only
assertions.reason: Response includes gcloud commands with maintenance window configuration for Saturday and Sunday (BYDAY=SA and BYDAY=SU) with specific start/end times

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command with --maintenance-window-start/end and --maintenance-window-recurrence for weekly weekend schedule
assertions.reason: Response shows gcloud container clusters update commands with --maintenance-window-start, --maintenance-window-end, and --maintenance-window-recurrence flags with FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SA/SU

assertions.expectation: Sets up maintenance exclusions for quarterly code freezes (up to 30 days each)
assertions.reason: Response includes maintenance exclusions for Q1-Q4 code freezes, each spanning approximately 20-21 days (within the 30-day limit)

assertions.expectation: Sets up a maintenance exclusion for the November audit period
assertions.reason: Response includes 'annual-audit-november' exclusion covering the entire month of November (2024-11-01 to 2024-11-30)

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for maintenance exclusions and how to handle longer freezes
assertions.reason: Response does not mention the 30-day maximum limit for maintenance exclusions or provide guidance on handling longer freeze periods

assertions.expectation: Explains that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: Response does not explain the difference between manual and auto-upgrades or clarify that maintenance windows only affect auto-upgrades

assertions.expectation: Recommends combining maintenance windows with Stable or Extended channel for maximum upgrade control
assertions.reason: Response does not mention GKE release channels (Stable/Extended) or recommend using them for better upgrade control

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for each exclusion (--add-maintenance-exclusion-name/start-time/end-time)
assertions.reason: Response includes gcloud commands with --add-maintenance-exclusion-name, --add-maintenance-exclusion-start, and --add-maintenance-exclusion-end flags for each exclusion period

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during long exclusion periods
assertions.reason: Response does not warn about the risks of falling behind on Kubernetes versions during extended exclusion periods or the potential security/support implications
